# PAI-SAFE vNext

Status: Bounded local transaction-safety foundation.

Purpose: Build PAI-SAFE as a verified transaction safety rail.

Commercial promise:

- Pay safely.
- Fulfill confidently.
- Prove what happened.

## Scope

This module implements the first local transaction circuit:

1. Merchant transaction request object
2. Consumer safe-pay view state
3. Advisory pre-payment trust check
4. SAFE / HOLD / REFUSED output
5. ProofBack Protection record
6. Proof-backed receipt
7. Merchant fulfillment readiness status

## Boundary

This module is not:

- a payment processor
- a bank replacement
- a wallet
- a custody system
- a legal claim engine
- an automatic dispute-win system
- a broad financial management app
- an external LLM integration
- a dashboard product

Transaction first.
Dashboard second.
Proof always.
